title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Samsung R&D India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Samsung R&D India
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
